1.acrostic: ROYAL STRUGGLE ADONIJAH FAILED BUT SOLOMON ANOINTED THE KINGS

2.acrostic: EXECUTION OF JOAB AND SHIMEI ESTABLISHED A SURE THRONE

3.acrostic: I GRANT YOU A WISE DISCERNING MIND

4.acrostic: GOD GAVE SOLOMON WISDOM BEYOND MEASURES

6.acrostic: OVERLAY THE WHOLE HOUSE WITH PURE GOLD SHEETS

7.acrostic: FURNISHINGS OF BRONZE AND TEMPLE PILLARS JACHIN BOAZ STANDS

8.acrostic: SOLOMON SPOKE TO ISRAEL AT THE DEDICATION OF THE TEMPLE AND BLESSED THE PEOPLES

9.acrostic: OTHER CITIES BUILT AND SHIPS SENT

10.acrostic: LOOK QUEEN OF SHEBA CAME TO TEST HIM

11.acrostic: ONE THOUSAND WOMEN TURNED HIS HEART TO FOREIGN GODS

12.acrostic: MADE REHOBOAM KING BUT ISRAEL REBELLED

13.acrostic: OLD PROPHET LIED TO THE MAN OF GOD WHO DIED

14.acrostic: NOW AHIJAH SAID JEROBOAM SON WILL DIE

15.acrostic: THERE WAS WAR BETWEEN ASA AND BAASHA LONG

16.acrostic: HE ZIMRI OMRI AND AHAB PROVOKED A HOLY GOD

17.acrostic: ELIJAH FED BY RAVENS AT BROOK

18.acrostic: NOW ELIJAH KILLED BAAL PROPHETS ON MOUNT CARMEL SLOPES

20.acrostic: ISRAEL SMOTE SYRIANS BUT AHAB SPARED KING BENHADAD

21.acrostic: FOR NABOTHS VINEYARD HE KILLED HIM

22.acrostic: THE KING AHAB HATED MICAIAH AND DIED IN BATTLE PIERCED BY ARROWS
